name: Sepsis - Broad-Spectrum Antibiotic Query
description: Tests ability to find sepsis patients via vancomycin or ceftriaxone prescriptions. Both highly cross-indicated — vancomycin for skin/bone infections, MRSA; ceftriaxone for community-acquired pneumonia, meningitis, gonorrhea.
prompt: Find patients prescribed broad-spectrum antibiotics (vancomycin or ceftriaxone).

prompts.broad: Find patients prescribed vancomycin or ceftriaxone — broad-spectrum antibiotics commonly used in sepsis empiric therapy. Both have many other indications.
prompts.expert: Identify patients receiving broad-spectrum antibiotic therapy consistent with empirical sepsis treatment by querying MedicationRequest resources. The two agents to target are vancomycin and ceftriaxone, both coded in RxNorm. Be aware that this medication path has substantial cross-indication: vancomycin is also used for MRSA skin and bone infections, and ceftriaxone for community-acquired pneumonia, meningitis, and gonorrhea — so a medication-only cohort will include patients treated for infections other than sepsis.

metadata.algorithm_path_description: Patients on vancomycin or ceftriaxone. High cross-indication with other infections.
